rules.title: PUA - CsExec Execution
rules.condition_summary: any selection exclusion filter exclusion filter matches*
rules.description: Detects the use of the lesser known remote execution tool named CsExec a PsExec alternative

rules.title: ProxyLogon MSExchange OabVirtualDirectory
rules.description: Detects specific patterns found after a successful ProxyLogon exploitation in relation to a Commandlet invocation of Set-OabVirtualDirectory

rules.title: Potential PsExec Remote Execution
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding 1 of filter_main_*
rules.description: Detects potential psexec command that initiate execution on a remote systems via common commandline flags used by the utility

rules.title: Uncommon File Created In Office Startup Folder
rules.condition_summary: ((selection_word_paths excluding filter_exclude_word_ext) or (selection_excel_paths excluding filter_exclude_excel_ext)) excluding 1 of filter_main_*
rules.description: Detects the creation of a file with an uncommon extension in an Office application startup folder
